'''Vickie Williams''' ([[September 12]], [[1950s#1958|1958]] – [[December 18]], [[2015]])<ref name="Death" /> was a letterer on a number of [[Dark Horse Comics|Dark Horse]] ''[[Star Wars]]'' comics.

{{Artist-stub}}
